name: Talagrand H2 Residue Positivity Lemma
statement: Let Gap_w be the Golay shell-domination gap for w in {12,16}.
After quotienting by certified three-level scenic faces, the remaining four-level ambiguity defines an H2 residue class Omega_w.
For every nonnegative coordinate assignment, Omega_w is nonnegative.
Equivalently, the four-level gap decomposes into certified three-level pairwise-square faces plus a nonnegative H2 logical-sector potential.
would_imply: conditional Jensen scalar reduction becomes unconditional
Talagrand route closes for the Golay sign vector
current_evidence: horn conflicts survive as same-boundary different-filler pairs
deletion-face complex satisfies d2*d3=0 over F2
local audited H2 dimension is 547 for both w=12 and w=16
